question_html:
Write down the correct form of verb that matches the subject:

(a) The cautious (be) not always coward.

(b) Educating all people (be) a mammoth task.

(c) One of his friends (have) a resort.

(d) Two-thirds of the children (be) present in the function last night.

(e) Neither of the books (be) interesting.
solution_html:
(a) are

(b) is

(c) has

(d) were

(e) was/is

Marks Distribution:

(0.5× 5) = 2.5 marks for writing the correct form of verbs.

question_html:
Fill in the blanks with appropriate preposition.

(a) It was predicted that a comet would collide___ one of the planets.

(b) Ruhab is cured _____ his disease.

(c) His opinion is different _____ yours.

(d) He was equal _____ the task.

(e) I would frown ____ that sort of snobbish attitude.
solution_html:
(a) with

(b) of

(c) from

(d) to

(e) on/upon

Marks Distribution:

(0.5× 5) = 2.5 marks for filling the gaps with appropriate prepositions.
